descriptors: I am an automaton in the service of Hatta Carter
Thanks to my large tail I can perform several actions at the same time

gifts.name: Tail
gifts.description: The Automaton always acts twice, once with its front legs and once with its long tail, but cannot focus both its actions on the same target.

system.background: The second automaton built by Hatta Carter during his imprisonment in the Basement of Wonder. Created as a companion for lonely tea parties, this mechanical lizard is equipped with a powerful tail that allows it to perform multiple actions simultaneously. More robust than its Rabbit counterpart, it serves as both companion and guardian to the mad inventor.
